sideEffectsSummarySql:
-- Side-effects summary for stress run: reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z
-- Run via: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f - <<'EOF'

select 'external_sync_events' as table_name, count(*)::text as cnt
  from external_sync_events
  where correlation_id like 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_inventory_activity', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_inventory_activity
  where correlation_id like 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_review_queue', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_review_queue
  where group_key like 'stress:reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z:%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z'
union all
select 'webhook_events', count(*)::text
  from webhook_events
  where external_webhook_id like 'reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z%'
union all
select 'warehouse_locations', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_locations
  where name like 'TEST-reconcile-chaos-2026-04-18T19-18-00-408Z-%';

-- EOF
notes: Dry run — would inject 3-unit Redis-vs-Postgres drift on 5 STRESS SKUs and trigger shipstation-bandcamp-reconcile-hot.
